steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes describe two neon sculptures: one spells out a concrete phrase, the other is an abstract form. The question asks for a sentence that emphasizes this contrast in how each sculpture uses neon.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'one spells out a phrase while the other is abstract': directly contrasts the two sculptures' forms — phrase vs. abstraction — which is the key distinction in the notes. ✓
  • Choice B — 'neon's broader uses': treats the form difference as secondary to a wider point about neon in general, losing the specific contrast. ✗
  • Choice C — 'shifts focus to dates': highlights when the works were created rather than how their forms differ. ✗
  • Choice D — 'different artists' intentions': redirects to artist intent rather than the formal contrast the notes establish. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
